# webcpu-agent-skill full

> Complete LLM manifest for the `webcpu-easel` agent skill repository.

Baseline package: `@xsyetopz/easel@0.5.0`.
Canonical source: `source/skills/webcpu-easel/`.
Use `llms.txt` for concise context and this file when an agent needs every reference, example, and template entry.
Agent rule: do not invent APIs; answer `UNKNOWN` when references and installed declarations do not verify a requested symbol or behavior.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): build, runtime support, Claude plugin marketplace install, agent prompts, install outputs, and grounding contract.
- [Agent instructions](AGENTS.md): canonical repository-wide AI agent rules.
- [Claude Code instructions](CLAUDE.md): generated Claude-specific wrapper importing `AGENTS.md`.
- [Gemini CLI instructions](GEMINI.md): generated Gemini wrapper importing `AGENTS.md`.
- [GitHub Copilot instructions](.github/copilot-instructions.md): generated Copilot repository guidance.
- [Cursor rule](.cursor/rules/webcpu-easel.mdc): generated Cursor always-apply project rule.
- [Zed rules](.rules): generated Zed project rule.
- [JetBrains AI Assistant rule](.aiassistant/rules/webcpu-easel.md): generated JetBrains project rule.
- [JetBrains Junie instructions](.junie/AGENTS.md): generated Junie-preferred `AGENTS.md`.
- [Cline rule](.clinerules/00-webcpu-easel.md): generated Cline workspace rule.
- [KiloCode Legacy installer](install.sh): online installer copies the packaged skill into `.kilocode/skills/webcpu-easel`.
- [Augment rule](.augment/rules/webcpu-easel.md): generated Augment workspace rule.
- [Agent platform matrix](docs/agent-platforms.md): generated support table and source links.
- [Contributing guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): contributor workflow, validation, generated-surface rules, CI/CD, and public-doc guardrails.
- [Skill contract](source/skills/webcpu-easel/body.md): execution protocol, anti-rules, runtime decision table.
- [Reference map](source/skills/webcpu-easel/REFERENCE.md): lookup order, examples, templates, references.

## References

- [animation](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/animation.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [api index](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/api-index.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [cameras controls](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/cameras-controls.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [chunked voxel terrain](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/chunked-voxel-terrain.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [class signatures](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/class-signatures.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [core concepts](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/core-concepts.md): EASEL.js reference document.

- [performance](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/performance.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [pointer input and grid picking](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/pointer-input-and-grid-picking.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [render loop recipes](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/render-loop-recipes.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [render pipeline](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/render-pipeline.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [renderer framebuffer](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/renderer-framebuffer.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [renderer orchestration](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/renderer-orchestration.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [setup](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/setup.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [sprites lines points](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/sprites-lines-points.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [texture atlas pipeline](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/texture-atlas-pipeline.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [textures assets](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/textures-assets.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [threejs migration](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/threejs-migration.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [type inspection guide](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/type-inspection-guide.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [version provenance](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/version-provenance.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [voxel worlds](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/voxel-worlds.md): EASEL.js reference document.
- [webgl webgpu comparison](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/webgl-webgpu-comparison.md): EASEL.js reference document.

## Examples

- [animated cube](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/animated-cube.ts): TypeScript example.
- [basic setup](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/basic-setup.ts): TypeScript example.
- [data texture from canvas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/data-texture-from-canvas.ts): TypeScript example.
- [fog and lighting](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/fog-and-lighting.ts): TypeScript example.
- [frame profiling](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/frame-profiling.ts): TypeScript example.
- [manual geometry](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/manual-geometry.ts): TypeScript example.
- [orbit camera](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/orbit-camera.ts): TypeScript example.
- [responsive canvas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/responsive-canvas.ts): TypeScript example.
- [skinned voxel animation](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/skinned-voxel-animation.ts): TypeScript example.
- [texture atlas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/texture-atlas.ts): TypeScript example.
- [voxel chunk mesher](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/voxel-chunk-mesher.ts): TypeScript example.
- [voxel picking](source/skills/webcpu-easel/examples/voxel-picking.ts): TypeScript example.

## Templates

- [astro canvas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/astro-canvas): project template.
- [deno browser](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/deno-browser): project template.
- [react canvas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/react-canvas): project template.
- [vite vanilla ts](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/vite-vanilla-ts): project template.
- [voxel world starter](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/voxel-world-starter): project template.

## CI/CD

- [CI workflow](.github/workflows/ci.yml): source, package, generated drift, template, and artifact validation.
- [Release workflow](.github/workflows/release.yml): tag-triggered archive build and GitHub Release publish.
- [Dependabot config](.github/dependabot.yml): GitHub Actions and npm dependency updates.

## Scripts

- [API extractor](scripts/extract-api.mjs): regenerate API references from installed `@xsyetopz/easel` declarations.
- [Skill generator](scripts/generate.mjs): generate platform skill files into `.build/generated/`.
- [Agent surface generator](scripts/generate-agent-surfaces.mjs): generate tool-specific wrappers and rules from `AGENTS.md`.
- [LLM context generator](scripts/generate-llms.mjs): generate expanded context files into `.build/llms/`.
- [Packager](scripts/package.mjs): package installable bundles into `dist/`.
- [Validator](scripts/validate.mjs): validate source, generated outputs, package outputs, agent surfaces, and LLM manifests.

## Optional

- [License](LICENSE): MIT license.
- [Package manifest](package.json): scripts and dependencies.
- [Biome config](biome.jsonc): formatting and lint rules.
- [TypeScript config](tsconfig.json): root typecheck entrypoint.
